# @llmnative/react ‚Äî Riferimento completo

Framework React AI-first per generazione deterministica di UI. Data-driven di default, schema-driven opzionale.
Versione 0.1.x ‚Äî Apache-2.0

```bash
npm install @llmnative/react
import '@llmnative/react/dist/index.css'
```

---

## Regole fondamentali

- Tutti gli import da `'@llmnative/react'` ‚Äî mai da sottodirectory
- I provider sono iniettati via `<App providers={...}>` ‚Äî mai importati direttamente nei componenti
- Usare `useDataProvider()`, `useAuthProvider()`, ecc. nei componenti, non istanze dirette
- TypeScript strict: no `any` ‚Äî usare `unknown`, `Record<string, unknown>`, tipi specifici
- Naming props: `view` (presentazione contenuto), `appearance` (guscio visuale), `layout` (disposizione spaziale), `mode` (comportamento operativo), `variant` (tono semantico), `position` (ancoraggio), `size` (scala)

---

## App ‚Äî Entry point

```tsx
<App
  providers={{
    firebase: { config: firebaseConfig },
    supabase: { url, anonKey },
    google: { oAuth2: { clientId } },
    mock: { data: mockData },
    services: {
      data:        'dbRealtime',      // DataDriverName
      storage:     'firestorage',     // StorageDriverName | null
      auth:        'googleAuth',      // AuthDriverName | null
      email:       'gmail',           // EmailDriverName | null
      ai:          'openai',          // AIDriverName | null
      credentials: 'googleServiceAccount',
    },
  }}
  iconProvider="lucide"              // 'lucide' | 'phosphor' | AppIconProviderConfig
  themeProvider="default"            // 'default' | 'flat' | 'cyber' | AppThemeProviderConfig
  menuConfig={menuConfig}
  importPage={(path) => import(path)}
/>
```

### AppThemeProviderConfig
```ts
{
  mode?: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system';
  theme: string;
  themes?: Record<string, {
    preset?: { colors?: ColorScale; radius?: number; font?: string };
    motion?: MotionRegistry;
    components?: Record<string, Partial<ThemeComponent>>;
  }>;
  themeOverride?: Record<string, Partial<ThemeComponent>>;
}
```

Built-in themes: `default`, `flat`, `cyber`.

---

## Provider System

### Matrix completa

| Servizio | Interfaccia | Driver | Config key | Obbligatorio |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| data | `DataProviderAdapter` | `mock`, `dbRealtime`, `firestoreDb`, `supabaseDb` | `providers.mock/firebase/supabase` | s√¨ (fallback: mock) |
| storage | `StorageProviderAdapter` | `firestorage`, `supabaseStorage` | `providers.firebase/supabase` | no |
| auth | `AuthProviderAdapter` | `googleAuth`, `firebaseAuth`, `supabaseAuth`, `dropboxAuth` | `providers.google/firebase/supabase/dropbox` | s√¨ (fallback: googleAuth) |
| email | `EmailProviderAdapter` | `gmail` | `providers.google` | no |
| ai | `AIProviderAdapter` | `openai`, `gemini`, `anthropic`, `deepseek`, `mistral`, `openrouter`, `opencode` | `Config.tsx AIConfig` | no |
| credentials | `CredentialsAdapter` | `googleServiceAccount` | `providers.google.serviceAccount` | no |

### Hooks

```ts
const data    = useDataProvider()           // DataProviderAdapter | null
const storage = useStorageProvider()        // StorageProviderAdapter | null
const auth    = useAuthProvider()           // AuthProviderAdapter | null
const email   = useEmailProvider()          // EmailProviderAdapter | null
const ai      = useAIProvider()             // AIProviderAdapter | null
const creds   = useCredentialsProvider()    // CredentialsAdapter | null

// Named provider (multi-provider setup)
const supabase = useDataProvider('supabase')
```

### Interfacce principali

```ts
// DataProviderAdapter
read(path, options?) / set(path, data) / update(path, data) / remove(path)
subscribe(path, callback: (records: RecordArray) => void): () => void
count?(path, where?): Promise<number>

// StorageProviderAdapter
upload(file, path): Promise<string|undefined>
getURL(path) / download(path): Promise<Blob|undefined> / delete(path): Promise<boolean>

// AuthProviderAdapter
signIn(intent?, options?) / signOut() / getUser(): UserProfile|null
onAuthChange(callback) / getAccessToken(): Promise<string|null>
```

### Auth sign-in methods

| method | Firebase | Supabase | Google |
|---|---|---|---|
| `password` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚Äî |
| `anonymous` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚Äî |
| `magic_link` | ‚Äî | ‚úÖ | ‚Äî |
| `oauth` (github, apple‚Ä¶) | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚Äî |
| GIS + scoped token | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚úÖ |

```ts
await auth.signIn({ method: 'password', email: '...', password: '...' })
await auth.signIn({ method: 'oauth', provider: 'github' })
// Google: token per API scope
const token = await auth.getAccessToken('https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send')
```

### CredentialsAdapter (Google Service Account)
```tsx
// Chiama Google APIs lato browser senza Node.js
<App providers={{ google: { serviceAccount: { clientEmail, privateKey } }, services: { credentials: 'googleServiceAccount' } }} />

const creds = useCredentialsProvider()
const token = await creds.getToken('https://www.googleapis.com/auth/solar')
```

### Provider custom
```ts
import { DataProviderAdapter, RecordArray } from '@llmnative/react'

export class RestDataProvider implements DataProviderAdapter {
  async read(path: string): Promise<unknown> { ... }
  async set(path: string, data: object): Promise<void> { ... }
  async update(path: string, data: object): Promise<void> { ... }
  async remove(path: string): Promise<void> { ... }
  subscribe(path: string | undefined, callback: (records: RecordArray) => void): () => void {
    return () => undefined
  }
}
```

---

## Grid ‚Äî CRUD table/gallery

```tsx
<Grid
  path="/users"               // DataProvider-backed ‚Äî oppure records={array} per in-memory
  columns={[
    { key: 'name',  label: 'Nome',   sortable: true },
    { key: 'email', label: 'Email' },
    { key: 'role',  label: 'Ruolo',  render: ({ value }) => <Badge>{value}</Badge> },
    { key: 'date',  label: 'Data',   render: 'date' },
  ]}
  actions={['add', 'edit', 'delete']}   // oppure Record<string, GridAction>
  view="table"                          // 'table' | 'gallery'
  pagination={{ limit: 20 }}
  groupBy="status"
  sortable={{ field: 'name', dir: 'asc' }}
  form={<FormFields />}
  onSave={async ({ record, action }) => record._key}
  onActionComplete={async ({ record, action }) => true}
  selection={{ mode: 'multiple', onChange: (sel) => {} }}
  reorderable
  onReorder={(records, meta) => {}}
  header={(ctx) => <div>{ctx.title}</div>}
  footer={(ctx) => <div>{ctx.records.length} records</div>}
/>
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `path` | `string \| "fromUrl"` | Path provider-backed |
| `records` | `RecordArray` | Dati in memoria (alternativa a path) |
| `columns` | `GridColumn[]` | `{ key, label, sortable?, render? }` |
| `actions` | `Array<'add'\|'edit'\|'delete'> \| Record<string, GridAction>` | |
| `view` | `'table' \| 'gallery'` | |
| `groupBy` | `string \| string[]` | |
| `pagination` | `{ limit: number }` | |
| `sortable` | `boolean \| OrderConfig` | |
| `form` | `ReactElement \| ((ctx) => ReactNode)` | Form condiviso per CRUD |
| `onSave` | `async ({ record, action }) => string` | |
| `onActionComplete` | `async ({ record, action }) => boolean` | |

**Render built-in colonne:** `'text'`, `'email'`, `'date'`, `'datetime'`, `'badge'`, `'image'`, `'boolean'`, `'json'`

**GridAction kind:** `'modal'` (default), `'route'`, `'external'`, `'inline'`, `'delete'`

---

## Form ‚Äî form CRUD con lifecycle

```tsx
<Form
  path="/products"
  appearance="card"           // 'card' | 'none'
  showBack
  defaultValues={{ status: 'draft' }}
  keyGenerator={() => `prod_${Date.now()}`}
  onLoad={(data) => ({ ...data, price: data.price / 100 })}
  onSave={async ({ record }) => ({ ...record, price: record.price * 100 })}
  onDelete={async ({ record }) => { /* confirm */ }}
  onComplete={async ({ action }) => { if (action === 'save') navigate('/products') }}
>
  <Input name="title" label="Titolo" required />
  <Input name="price" label="Prezzo" inputType="number" />
  <Input name="address.city" label="Citt√Ý" />      {/* oggetto annidato */}
  <Repeat name="tags" defaultLength={1}>
    {(i) => <Input name={`tags.${i}`} label={`Tag ${i+1}`} />}
  </Repeat>
</Form>
```

| Prop | Tipo | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `path` | `string` | Path provider-backed |
| `appearance` | `'card' \| 'none'` | |
| `showBack` | `boolean` | |
| `defaultValues` | `RecordProps` | Valori iniziali per nuovo record |
| `keyGenerator` | `(record) => string` | Generatore chiave primaria custom |
| `onLoad` | `(record) => RecordProps` | Trasforma dopo il caricamento |
| `onRecordChange` | `(record) => void` | Cambio campo in tempo reale |
| `onSave` | `FormSaveHandler` | Trasforma prima del salvataggio |
| `onDelete` | `FormDeleteHandler` | Hook prima della cancellazione |
| `onComplete` | `FormFinallyHandler` | Dopo save/delete |

**FormRef** (via `useRef<FormRef>()`): `{ handleSave, handleDelete, getRecord, getHeader, getFooter }`

---

## Campi form

### Input
```tsx
<Input name="x" label="..." required inputType="number" min={0} max={100} step={0.01} />
<Input.TextArea name="x" rows={4} />
<Input.Checkbox name="x" valueChecked="yes" />
```
`inputType`: `text`(default) `number` `email` `password` `color` `date` `time` `datetime-local` `week` `month`
`name`(req) `label` `required` `disabled` `placeholder` `min` `max` `step` `validator:(v)=>string|undefined`

### Select
```tsx
<Select name="role" options={[{ label: 'Admin', value: 'admin' }]} />
<Select name="categoryId" optionsSource={{ path: '/categories', labelField: 'name', valueField: '_key' }} />
<Select.Autocomplete name="userId" optionsSource={{ path: '/users', labelField: 'email' }} />
<Select.Checklist name="tags" options={['a', 'b', 'c']} />
```

| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `options` | `Option[] \| string[] \| number[]` |
| `optionsSource` | `{ path, labelField, valueField? }` ‚Äî carica da provider |
| `order` | `{ field: 'label' \| 'value', dir: 'asc' \| 'desc' }` |

### Upload
```tsx
<Upload name="file" label="Allegato" accept=".pdf,.zip" multiple />
<Upload.Image name="cover" label="Copertina" />    {/* con crop editor */}
<Upload.Document name="pdf" label="PDF" />
<UploadCSV name="data" label="Importa CSV" />      {/* con preview tabellare */}
```

| Prop | Tipo |
|---|---|
| `name` | `string` (required) |
| `accept` | `string` |
| `multiple` | `boolean` |
| `editable` | `boolean` |
| `max` | `number` (MB) |

### Repeat ‚Äî array dinamici
```tsx
<Repeat name="items" defaultLength={3} minItems={1} maxItems={10}>
  {(index) => (
    <>
      <Input name={`items.${index}.name`} label="Nome" />
      <Upload.Image name={`items.${index}.photo`} label="Foto" />
    </>
  )}
</Repeat>
```

### Prompt ‚Äî campo AI-potenziato
```tsx
<Prompt
  name="summary"
  mode="run"                  // 'edit' | 'run'
  onRunPrompt={async (prompt, options) => AI.fetch(prompt)}
  commands={[{ name: 'translate', icon: 'languages', handler: (v) => `Translate:\n${v}` }]}
  attachments
  statusItems={['tokensIn', 'tokensOut', 'contextPercent', 'duration']}
/>
```

---

## UI Primitives

### Alert
```tsx
<Alert variant="success">Salvato!</Alert>
<Alert variant="warning" icon placement="fixed" timeout={3000}>Attenzione</Alert>
```
`variant`: `'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'light' | 'dark'`
`appearance`: `'default' | 'text'`
`placement`: `'inline' | 'fixed'`

### Badge
```tsx
<Badge variant="success">Attivo</Badge>
```
`variant`: stessi valori di Alert

### Button variants
```tsx
<ActionButton variant="primary" label="Salva" icon="save" onClick={handleSave} />
<LoadingButton variant="primary" label="Invia" onClick={async (e, setMsg) => { await save(); setMsg('Salvato!') }} />
<BackLink label="Indietro" />
<GoSite href="https://..." label="Visita" />
```

**IButton props:** `variant`, `label`, `icon`, `badge`, `disabled`, `loading`, `onClick`

### Card
```tsx
<Card title="Titolo" header={<Actions />} footer={<Pagination />} loading={isLoading}>
  {children}
</Card>
```

### Modal
```tsx
<Modal title="Conferma" size="md" position="center" onClose={() => {}} onSave={handleSave} onDelete={handleDelete}>
  {content}
</Modal>
<Modal.YesNo title="Sicuro?" onClose={() => {}} onSave={() => {}} />
<Modal.Ok title="Completato!" onClose={() => {}} />
```
`size`: `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | 'fullscreen'`
`position`: `'center' | 'top' | 'left' | 'right' | 'bottom'`

### Table
```tsx
<Table
  columns={[{ key: 'name', label: 'Nome', sort: true }]}
  records={records}
  onRowClick={(record) => {}}
  selection="multiple"
  sortable={{ field: 'name', dir: 'asc' }}
  pagination={{ limit: 20 }}
/>
```

### Gallery
```tsx
<Gallery
  records={records}           // GalleryRecord extends RecordProps: img, thumbnail, name, width, height
  overlays={[{ position: 'top-right', badge: { variant: 'success', children: 'New' } }]}
  columns={3}
  gutterSize={2}
  onClickRow={(record) => {}}
/>
```

### Tab
```tsx
<Tab defaultIndex={0} layout="top">
  <Tab.Item label="Generale">{content1}</Tab.Item>
  <Tab.Item label="SEO">{content2}</Tab.Item>
</Tab>
```
`layout`: `'default' | 'top' | 'left' | 'right' | 'bottom'`

### Image
```tsx
<Image src="..." fit="cover" position="center" width={400} height={300} />
```
`fit`: `'cover' | 'contain' | 'fill' | 'scale-down' | 'none'`

### Pagination (standalone)
```tsx
<Pagination records={items} limit={20}>
  {(pageRecords, offset) => pageRecords.map(r => <Row key={r._key} record={r} />)}
</Pagination>
```

### Percentage
```tsx
<Percentage value={75} appearance="bar" variant="success" showText />
<Percentage value={0.75} appearance="circle" size={60} />
```

### Altre primitive
```tsx
<Icon name="user" size={20} />           // usa provider icone configurato
<ImageAvatar src="..." label="Mario" size={40} />
<Loader />                               // spinner
<Code language="tsx">{snippet}</Code>   // syntax highlight
<GridSystem.Row><GridSystem.Col xs={12} md={6}>...</GridSystem.Col></GridSystem.Row>
```

---

## Blocks

```tsx
<Breadcrumbs trail={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Utenti' }]} separator="/" jsonLd />
<Brand url="/" label="MyApp" logo="/logo.svg" width={120} />
<Search onQueryChange={(e) => setQ(e.target.value)} />
<Notifications />
<Carousel images={[...]} />
```

---

## Widgets

### MarkdownReader
```tsx
<MarkdownReader
  content={markdownString}
  onInternalLinkClick={(href, e) => { e.preventDefault(); navigate(href) }}
  wrapperClassName="prose"
/>
```

### ImageEditor
```tsx
<ImageEditor src="..." onSave={(blob) => upload(blob)} />
```

### TabDynamic
Tab con lazy loading dei contenuti ‚Äî gestione dinamica aggiunta/rimozione tab.

---

## AI Integration

```ts
import { AI } from '@llmnative/react'

const text  = await AI.fetch("Scrivi un titolo per: {keyword}", { keyword: "React" })
const json  = await AI.json("Lista di 5 categorie per blog tech")
const arr   = await AI.array("5 tag per: machine learning")

// Hooks
const provider  = useAIProvider()           // provider di default
const registry  = useAIProviderRegistry()   // tutti i provider AI registrati
const catalog   = getAIModelCatalog()       // modelli disponibili

// Provider custom
class MyAIProvider implements AIProviderAdapter {
  async fetch(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<string> { ... }
  async json<T>(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<T> { ... }
  async array(prompt: string, options?: AIRequestOptions): Promise<string[]> { ... }
}
```

Configurazione API key in `Config.tsx`: `geminiApiKey`, `openaiApiKey`, `anthropicApiKey`, `deepSeekApiKey`, `mistralApiKey`.

---

## Theme e icone

```tsx
const theme = useThemeController()
theme.applyTheme('flat')     // 'default' | 'flat' | 'cyber' | custom
theme.setMode('dark')        // 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'

const icons = useIconController()
icons.setProvider('phosphor')   // 'lucide' | 'phosphor' | custom
```

---

## Head (SEO)

```ts
useHead({
  title: 'Pagina',
  description: '...',
  robots: 'noindex',
  canonical: 'https://...',
  og: { title: '...', image: '...' }
})
```

---

## Global state (localStorage)

```ts
const vars = useGlobalVars()
getGlobalVars('key')
setGlobalVars({ key: 'value' })
removeGlobalVars('key')
```

---

## Hooks completi

| Hook | Ritorna |
|---|---|
| `useDataProvider(name?)` | `DataProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useStorageProvider(name?)` | `StorageProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAuthProvider(name?)` | `AuthProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useEmailProvider(name?)` | `EmailProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAIProvider(name?)` | `AIProviderAdapter \| null` |
| `useAIProviderRegistry()` | `Record<string, AIProviderAdapter>` |
| `useTheme()` | `Theme \| undefined` |
| `useThemeController()` | `ThemeController` |
| `useIconController()` | `IconController` |
| `useAccessToken()` | `string \| null` |
| `useGlobalVars()` | `Record<string, unknown>` |
| `useHead()` | `HeadController` |
| `useProxy()` | `(url, init?) => Promise<Response>` |
| `useImage()` | `UseImageResult` |
| `useI18n()` | `I18nController` |
| `useMenu()` | Menu hook |

---

## Tipi chiave

```ts
type RecordProps  = Record<string, FieldValue>
type FieldValue   = string | number | boolean | null | undefined | Record<string, unknown> | unknown[]
type RecordArray  = RecordProps[]

type OrderConfig  = { field: string; dir: 'asc' | 'desc' }
type WhereClause  = { field: string; op: '==' | '!=' | '<' | '<=' | '>' | '>=' | 'in' | 'not-in' | 'array-contains' | 'array-contains-any'; value: unknown }

interface UIProps {
  before?: React.ReactNode
  after?: React.ReactNode
  wrapperClassName?: string
  className?: string
}

type UserProfile = { uid?: string; email?: string; displayName?: string; photoURL?: string; [key: string]: unknown }
```

---

## Utilities

```ts
import { cn, converter, sanitizer, order, path, fetch, seo } from '@llmnative/react'

cn('base', condition && 'extra', className)   // tailwind-merge classname
seo.getKeywordIdeas(keyword)                  // Google Ads Keywords
seo.getGoogleTrendsData(keyword)              // Google Trends
```

---

## Struttura scaffold (npx create)

```
src/
  index.tsx          ‚Üê App entry: <App providers=... menuConfig=... importPage=... />
  conf/menu.ts       ‚Üê menuConfig: array di voci nav con path, label, icon, children
  layouts/           ‚Üê wrapper per aree dell'app (con sidebar, header)
  pages/             ‚Üê componenti pagina (una per route nel menu)
  components/        ‚Üê componenti custom
  styles/globals.css ‚Üê @import '@llmnative/react/dist/index.css' + override
```

---

## Dove cercare nel codice sorgente

| Cosa | File |
|---|---|
| Form | `src/components/widgets/Form.tsx` |
| Grid | `src/components/widgets/Grid.tsx` |
| Campi form | `src/components/ui/fields/` |
| Provider data Firebase | `src/providers/data/firebase.ts` |
| Provider data Supabase | `src/providers/data/supabase.ts` |
| Provider auth Firebase | `src/providers/auth/firebase/FirebaseAuthProvider.ts` |
| Provider auth Google | `src/providers/auth/google/` |
| Interfaccia DataProvider | `src/providers/data/DataProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia StorageProvider | `src/providers/storage/StorageProvider.ts` |
| Interfaccia AuthProvider | `src/providers/auth/AuthProvider.ts` |
| Registry provider | `src/providers/manifest.ts` |
| AI integration | `src/providers/ai/index.ts` |
| SEO / Google Trends | `src/providers/seo/google/` |
| Sistema tema | `src/Theme.tsx` |
| Config runtime | `src/Config.tsx` |
| Tipi TypeScript | `src/types/` |
| Utilities pure | `src/libs/` |
